caption: A person holds a basketball trading card encased in a clear protective sleeve over a black table featuring an orange and white logo and the text "JASPYS" and "CASEBREAKS.COM". The card depicts a basketball player in a dark uniform. In the background, several black boxes with "OBSIDIAN" written in green letters are stacked. As the sequence progresses, the person moves the card away from the camera, revealing a black box below it that says "2 AUTOGRAPHS!" and "OBSIDIAN". Small inset windows show a man with short hair wearing a black hoodie sitting in a room with various pieces of equipment and more trading card boxes. The scene transitions from a close-up focus on the protective sleeve to a wider shot that includes the man in the background and more of the branded table surface.
